pi_items.source: Task description and standard Quartz cron format verification.
/workspace/scripts/setup_artifactory.sh explicitly uses admin:password for setup and default credentials.
/workspace/scripts/setup_artifactory.sh explicitly uses admin:password for setup and default credentials.
JFrog official documentation for System Configuration API and usage in setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The correct target cron expression for 02:00 AM every Sunday is '0 0 2 ? * SUN'. The Artifactory instance uses default credentials (admin / password) which are established during environment setup. The API endpoint to verify system configuration changes is /artifactory/api/system/configuration.
